title: poa laxa subsp. riphaea
intro: Poa laxa subsp. riphaea is a sub-species of the Poa laxa grass, which is a type of alpine grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa laxa subsp. riphaea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
